title: Verrier tops Speed Classic
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Michael Verrier, a race driver...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Michael Verrier, a race driver from Knysna, sped to the top of his class at the inaugural Speed Classic Cape Town, securing victory in the King of the Mountain event this past Sunday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Michael Verrier, a race driver from Knysna, sped to the top of his class at the inaugural Speed Classic Cape Town, securing victory in the King of the Mountain event this past Sunday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Behind the wheel of his sleek BMW Z4M, Verrier posted a blistering 41.312-second run up the iconic 1.8km Philip Kgosana Drive, beating the competition by nearly a full second."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Verrier's outstanding performance saw him finish 0.982 seconds ahead of Raynere Joubert, who piloted a Ford Mustang, while Mark Ridgway completed the top three with a 44.834-second time in his Owen Ashley V8 IPV8.","html":"Verrier's outstanding performance saw him finish 0.982 seconds ahead of Raynere Joubert, who piloted a Ford Mustang, while Mark Ridgway completed the top three with a 44.834-second time in his Owen Ashley V8 IPV8."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Speed Classic Cape Town event, a prestigious invitation-only hillclimb competition, brought together more than 150 cars for an action-packed weekend.","html":"The Speed Classic Cape Town event, a prestigious invitation-only hillclimb competition, brought together more than 150 cars for an action-packed weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event kicked off on Saturday with the Classic Car races, leading into the King of the Mountain showdown on Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The hillclimb, set against the breathtaking backdrop of Table Mountain, captivated fans and participants, offering some of the most thrilling motorsport action to grace Cape Town's streets.","html":"The hillclimb, set against the breathtaking backdrop of Table Mountain, captivated fans and participants, offering some of the most thrilling motorsport action to grace Cape Town's streets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event was a massive success, drawing nearly 15 000 spectators to Philip Kgosana Drive, while an impressive","html":"The event was a massive success, drawing nearly 15 000 spectators to Philip Kgosana Drive, while an impressive"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"180 000 fans from around the globe tuned in via livestream to witness the high-speed drama unfold.","html":"180 000 fans from around the globe tuned in via livestream to witness the high-speed drama unfold."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Michael Verrier's sleek BMW Z4M.","html":"Michael Verrier's sleek BMW Z4M."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
